name: canopy
description: Canopy — build AI-agent organizations as literal, executable org charts. Phase 1: the WYSIWYG org-chart editor and thin persistence server.

scripts.dev:server: uv run --project server uvicorn canopy_server.main:app --reload --reload-dir server/src --port 8700
scripts.typecheck:server: uv run --project server ruff check server/src && uv run --project server python -c "import canopy_server.main"
scripts.test: pnpm run test:ui && pnpm run test:server
